title: Proclamation No. 365, s. 2000
text:
MALACAÑANG MANILA

PROCLAMATION NO. 365

CREATING AND DESIGNATING CERTAIN PARCELS OF LAND SITUATED IN NICHOLS FIELD, NINOY AQUINO INTERNATIONAL AIRPORT, PASAY CITY, METRO MANILA AS A SPECIAL ECONOMIC ZONE PURSUANT TO REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7916 AS AMENDED BY REPUBLIC ACT NO. 8748

Pursuant to the powers vested in me under Republic Act No. 7916, otherwise known as the Special Economic Zone Act of 1995 as amended and upon recommendation of the Board of Directors of the Philippine Economic Zone Authority, I, JOSEPH EJERCITO ESTRADA, President of the Philippines, do hereby create and designate as a special economic zone, subject to the provisions of Republic Act No. 7916, as amended, its Implementing Rules and Regulations, and Resolution No. 00-113 dated 06 April 2000 of the Board of Directors of the Philippine Economic Zone Authority, an area located in Nichols Field, Ninoy Aquino International Airport, Pasay City, consisting of TWO HUNDRED TWENTY SIX THOUSAND NINE HUNDRED FIFTEEN (226,915) SQUARE METERS , more or less, as defined by the following technical description:

A parcel of land (3270-B-E-A-2-A-1 of the subd. plan Psd-00-055525, being a portion of Lot 3270-B-3-A-2-A, Swo-00-001755, LRC Record No. 2484), situated in the Barangay Villamor Air Base, City of Pasay, Metro Manila, Island of Luzon. Bounded on the NW., along lines 1 to 13 by Swo-007607-001236-D; on the NE., SE., and SW., along lines 13 to 17 by Lot 3270-B-3-A-2-A-2 of the subd. plan; and on the SW., along line 17-1 by Swo-007607-001236-D.

Beginning at a point marked “1” on plan, being S. 76 deg. 51’W., 6011.38 m. from BLLM No. 1, MCadm-590-D, Taguig Cad. Mapping;

Beginning, containing an area of TWO HUNDRED TWENTY SIX THOUSAND NINE HUNDRED FIFTEEN (226,915) SQUARE METERS, more or less. All points referred to are indicated on plan and marked on the ground by PS cyl. conc. mons. 15 x 60 cm.; Bearing, grid; date of original survey, 1909 (Psu-2031) and that of the subd.; date of survey June 22, 2000 and approved on August 15, 2000.

IN WITNESS THEREOF, I have hereunto set my hand and cause the seal of the Republic of the Philippines to be affixed hereto.

Done in the City of Manila, this 30 th day of August, in the year of Our Lord, Two Thousand.

(Sgd.) JOSEPH EJERCITO ESTRADA

By the President: (Sgd.) RONALDO B. ZAMORA Executive Secretary

Source: CDAsia
